heading: Review of institutions and other entities authorized to enroll or sponsor certain nonimmigrants
label: 1762 Review of institutions and other entities authorized to enroll or sponsor certain nonimmigrants
notes: Abolition of Immigration and Naturalization Service and Transfer of FunctionsFor abolition of Immigration and Naturalization Service, transfer of functions, and treatment of related references, see note set out under .section 1551 of this title

children.text: recordkeeping and reporting requirements to receive nonimmigrants under section 1101(a)(15)(F), (M), or (J) of this title; and
recordkeeping and reporting requirements under .section 1372 of this title

children.heading: Periodic review of sponsors of exchange visitors
children.label: b Periodic review of sponsors of exchange visitors

children.heading: Requirement for reviews
children.label: 1 Requirement for reviews
children.text: Not later than two years after , and every two years thereafter, the Secretary of State shall conduct a review of the entities designated to sponsor exchange visitor program participants under .May 14, 2002section 1101(a)(15)(J) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: recordkeeping and reporting requirements to receive nonimmigrant exchange visitor program participants under ; andsection 1101(a)(15)(J) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: recordkeeping and reporting requirements under .section 1372 of this title

children.heading: Effect of material failure to comply
children.label: c Effect of material failure to comply
children.text: Material failure of an institution or other entity to comply with the recordkeeping and reporting requirements to receive nonimmigrant students or exchange visitor program participants under section 1101(a)(15)(F), (M), or (J) of this title, or , shall result in the suspension for at least one year or termination, at the election of the Commissioner of Immigration and Naturalization, of the institution’s approval to receive such students, or result in the suspension for at least one year or termination, at the election of the Secretary of State, of the other entity’s designation to sponsor exchange visitor program participants, as the case may be.section 1372 of this title
